body:
## Problem

`public/llms/tools/` contains 5 tool markdown files but is missing the name generator:

```
✅ /llms/tools/dream-set-builder.md
✅ /llms/tools/gear-comparison.md
✅ /llms/tools/gear-search.md
✅ /llms/tools/kit-builder.md
✅ /llms/tools/tier-list.md
❌ /llms/tools/name-generator.md  ← MISSING
```

The sitemap (`api/sitemap.js:499-504`) lists all 5 existing files but omits name-generator.md.

The name generator tool is in `toolPages` (`api/sitemap.js:200`: `metal-drummer-name-generator`) and has a dedicated page at `/tools/name-generator`, so it should have LLM markdown parity with the other tools.

## Fix

1. Create `public/llms/tools/name-generator.md`:

```markdown
# Metal Drummer Name Generator — MetalForge

MetalForge's Metal Drummer Name Generator creates unique drummer aliases for metal musicians, gamers, and band projects.

## What It Does

Generates random metal drummer names combining:
- Aggressive adjectives (Brutal, Iron, Atomic, etc.)
- Metal-inspired nouns (Hammer, Blast, Thunder, etc.)
- Optional band-style surnames

## How to Use

Visit https://metalforge.io/tools/name-generator, click "Generate" to create a random metal drummer alias instantly.

## Examples

- "Atomic Flo" (inspired by Gene Hoglan's "Atomic Clock" nickname)
- "Iron Blast" (inspired by Joey Jordison's explosive style)

## Related Tools

- Dream Set Builder: https://metalforge.io/tools/dream-set-builder
- Drummer Tier List: https://metalforge.io/tools/tier-list
```

2. Add to `api/sitemap.js` in the tools LLM section (after line 504):

```javascript
{ loc: '/llms/tools/name-generator.md', priority: '0.6', changefreq: 'monthly' },
```

## Files to Touch

- `public/llms/tools/name-generator.md` — new file
- `api/sitemap.js` — add sitemap entry

## Quality Gate

- File exists at `public/llms/tools/name-generator.md`
- `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/tools/name-generator.md` → 200 OK with content
- Sitemap includes `/llms/tools/name-generator.md`

## Done

- [x] name-generator.md created with ≥200 words
- [x] Sitemap entry added
- [x] Internal links to related tools included

## Status

Already shipped in commits d2d6ee9 (#1423) and e1ff3e3 (#1465). Both files verified present on branch.
title: SEO: /llms/tools/name-generator.md — metal drummer name generator missing from LLM tools surface
